calendar.matters:
Motionof Plaintiff For Order To Vacate And Set Aside The Acknowlegment Of (Full) Satisfaction Of Judgment And Reinstate Judgment Due To Plaintiffs Counsels Mistaken Filing Of The Satisfaction
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FERGUSON ENTERPRISES, LLC'S Motion For Order To Vacate And Set Aside The Acknowlegment Of (Full) Satisfaction Of Judgment And Reinstate Judgment Due To Plaintiffs Counsels Mistaken Filing Of The Satisfaction

PLAINTIFF FERGUSON ENTERPRISES, LLC'S Motion For Order To Vacate And Set Aside The Acknowlegment Of (Full) Satisfaction Of Judgment And Reinstate Judgment Due To Plaintiffs Counsels Mistaken Filing Of The Satisfaction

The unopposed motion to vacate Plaintiff's Acknowledgment of (Full) Satisfaction of Judgment, filed on December 26, 2025, is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
